assertions.expectation: Distinguishes between dev (Rapid) and prod (Stable) clusters in the checklists
assertions.reason: Response clearly identifies dev clusters on Rapid channel vs prod clusters on Stable channel and recommends testing on dev clusters first

assertions.expectation: Recognizes Autopilot limitations (no node management, no SSH, mandatory resource requests)
assertions.reason: Response includes Autopilot-specific section noting no privileged pods, resource request requirements, and limited rollback options

assertions.expectation: Includes API deprecation checks with kubectl commands
assertions.reason: While it mentions checking for deprecated APIs, it doesn't provide specific kubectl commands to perform these checks

assertions.expectation: Mentions mandatory resource requests as an Autopilot-specific concern
assertions.reason: Response specifically mentions 'Verify resource requests comply with Autopilot minimums' in the Autopilot-specific section

assertions.expectation: Pre-upgrade checklist includes workload readiness items (PDBs, bare pods, graceful shutdown)
assertions.reason: Response includes PodDisruptionBudgets configuration, graceful restart handling, and health checks in the application readiness section

assertions.expectation: Post-upgrade checklist includes version verification commands
assertions.reason: While it mentions checking cluster status, it doesn't provide specific kubectl commands to verify the cluster version after upgrade

assertions.expectation: Post-upgrade checklist includes workload health validation
assertions.reason: Response includes comprehensive workload health checks including replica counts, pod restart counts, service validation, and health endpoints

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing on dev clusters before prod auto-upgrade
assertions.reason: First item in pre-upgrade checklist specifically recommends verifying Rapid channel dev clusters are on 1.32+ and testing applications

assertions.expectation: Mentions that checking the GKE release schedule gives ~1 month best-case advance notice for new minor upgrades, beyond the 72h notification
assertions.reason: Response doesn't mention the GKE release schedule or the 1-month advance notice timeframe for planning purposes
Response includes monitoring setup, alerting configuration, dashboard preparation, and post-upgrade monitoring verification

assertions.expectation: Does NOT proactively recommend node-level maintenance exclusions for Autopilot unless the customer explicitly asks for node upgrade control
assertions.reason: Response correctly avoids mentioning node-level maintenance exclusions, focusing on Autopilot-appropriate recommendations instead
